ddls:
CREATE TABLE "dragons" (
  "dragon_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dragon */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the player controlling the dragon */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the dragon */,
  "age" TEXT /* Age category of the dragon (e.g., Wyrmling, Young) */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size category of the dragon (e.g., Small, Medium, Large) */,
  "breed" TEXT /* Type or breed of the dragon (e.g., Red Dragon, Blue Dragon) */,
  "alignment" TEXT /* Moral and ethical alignment of the dragon */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the dragon */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the dragon */,
  "hit_dice" TEXT /* Hit dice for the dragon, indicating health points */,
  "base_attack" TEXT /* Base attack bonus of the dragon */,
  "attack" INTEGER /* Attack modifier for the dragon */,
  "fort_save" INTEGER /* Fortitude saving throw bonus */,
  "ref_save" INTEGER /* Reflex saving throw bonus */,
  "will_save" INTEGER /* Will saving throw bonus */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the dragon */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dragon was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dragon's data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dragon_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dragons_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "abilities" (
  "ability_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ability record */,
  "dragon_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dragon character */,
  "ability_name" TEXT /* Name of the special ability */,
  "breath_weapon_dc" TEXT /* Breath weapon difficulty class for the dragon */,
  "frightful_presence_dc" TEXT /* Frightful presence difficulty class for the dragon */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the ability */,
  "effect" TEXT /* Effect of the ability */,
  "cooldown" INTEGER /* Cooldown period in rounds or turns */,
  "usage_limit" INTEGER /* Number of times the ability can be used per day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ability_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_abilities_dragon_id FOREIGN KEY ("dragon_id") REFERENCES dragons ("dragon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "combat_stats" (
  "combat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for combat statistics */,
  "dragon_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dragon character */,
  "initiative_bonus" INTEGER /* Initiative bonus of the dragon */,
  "armor_class" INTEGER /* Armor class of the dragon */,
  "speed" TEXT /* Movement speed of the dragon */,
  "reach" TEXT /* Attack reach of the dragon */,
  "grapple_bonus" TEXT /* Grapple bonus of the dragon */,
  "special_attacks" TEXT /* Special attacks the dragon can perform */,
  "damage_resistance" TEXT /* Damage resistance of the dragon */,
  "vulnerability" TEXT /* Vulnerability of the dragon */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("combat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_combat_stats_dragon_id FOREIGN KEY ("dragon_id") REFERENCES dragons ("dragon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "progression" (
  "progression_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for progression records */,
  "dragon_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dragon character */,
  "current_stage" TEXT /* Current developmental stage of the dragon */,
  "next_stage" TEXT /* Next developmental stage of the dragon */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Level of the dragon */,
  "experience_points" INTEGER /* Experience points accumulated by the dragon */,
  "stage_requirements" TEXT /* Requirements for advancing to the next stage */,
  "progress_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the progression was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("progression_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_progression_dragon_id FOREIGN KEY ("dragon_id") REFERENCES dragons ("dragon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player controlling the dragon */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the player */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the player account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the player's data was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp when the player last logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the player's account (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for the player controlling the dragon
Age category of the dragon (e.g., Wyrmling, Young)
